title: Annemarie Deegan Named First Deputy Commissioner of Finance
summary: Mayor Ben Walsh appointed Annemarie Deegan as First Deputy Commissioner of Finance, the newly created position. Deegan will oversee centralized financial operations, payroll, capital management, risk mitigation, and modernization initiatives across City departments. She brings 15 years of City service, including roles in Parks and the Office of Management and Budget, and is pursuing an MBA.
department_refs: Department of Parks, Recreation and Youth Programs

political_signal.description: Administration demonstrates commitment to financial modernization and operational efficiency through internal promotion and new leadership structure in Finance.

processing_notes: Sharon F. Owens mentioned in navigation menu but not in article body—likely editorial artifact
First Deputy Commissioner appears to be newly created position
Deegan's education credentials (BFA, MBA-in-progress) noted but may indicate gap in finance-specific background
